---
title: "ACoP16 Programming"
description: SxP reviewed the ACoP program and abstracts to select content of interest for SxP
categories: 
- ACoP16
- Program
date: 2025-10-18
toc: true
---

[Link to the ACoP16 program and abstracts](https://acop2025.eventscribe.net/agenda.asp?pfp=BrowsebyDay)

## Sunday Oct 19

**02:00 PM – 03:30 PM C2C - High-impact Applications of Model-based Meta-analyses (MBMA) in Drug Development**

## Monday October 20

**12:30 PM – 02:00 PM SxP SIG Lunch**

**02:00 PM – 03:30 PM C3B - Envisioning the Role of GenAI in Modern Pharmacometric Workflows** 

## Tuesday October 21

**11:00 AM – 11:15 AM Colorado B-D - Full Random Effects Modelling (FREM): Scaling the Heights of Covariate Modelling**

**11:15 AM – 11:30 AM Red Rock 8/9 - Finding complex relationships between random effects and covariates using data-driven distributions**

**11:30 AM – 11:45 AM Red Rock 8/9 - Trustworthy AI: A multidisciplinary review of the guiding principles for the implementation of AI/ML**

**01:45 PM – 03:15 PM C5A - Advancing Automation Tools to Accelerate Drug Development: Cross-SIG Perspectives**

**01:45 PM – 03:15 PM C5A - Bridging Causal Inference and Pharmacometric Modeling**
